name: Showing a little ‘Appreciation’; Beach Day with the strongest, Kali.
description:
You decided to show a little appreciation for your girlfriend’s appearance outside of her fixer attire. However, that’s the Red fucking mist who your dating.

Yeah random The Red mist drops outta nowhere, mostly cause she’s bad as hell and I wanted to have a shot at it.

Yeah have fun, will likely continue with Limbus content soon enough, or maybe just make a Gebura bot as a Sequal to Kali.
creator: Typebrighter
